title: ⚠ Count mismatch — Deliverable count changed from 4 (as of Feb 24) to 3 (as of Feb 25); data-quality monitoring descoped.
message: Deliverable count changed from 4 (as of Feb 24) to 3 (as of Feb 25); data-quality monitoring descoped.
